videoSnippet.title: The Ultimate Fighter || Hans Niemann vs Mukhiddin Madaminov || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Niemann, Hans Moke (2742) - Madaminov, Mukhiddin (2586)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [09] 2026.06.15
A28 English, four knights, Nimzovich variation

1.c4 Nf6 2.Nc3 e5 3.Nf3 Nc6 4.e4 Bb4 5.d3 d6 6.h3 Bc5 7.Be2 O-O 8.O-O a6 9.Bg5 h6 10.Bh4 Nd4 11.Qd2 Nxe4 12.Nxe4 Nxf3+ 13.Bxf3 Qxh4 14.Nxc5 dxc5 15.Rfe1 Re8 16.b4 cxb4 17.Qxb4 Qd4 18.Rad1 a5 19.Qa3 c6 20.Re4 Qb6 21.Qc3 Qb4 22.Qa1 f6 23.c5 Qxc5 24.d4 Qe7 25.dxe5 fxe5 26.Rde1 Qf6 27.Qc3 a4 28.a3 Kh8 29.Rxe5 Bd7 30.Bd1 Rxe5 31.Rxe5 Rf8 32.Qe3 b5 33.Bc2 Kg8 34.Bb1 Qf4 35.Qe1 Qd4 36.Re3 Qc5 37.g4 Qd6 38.Rd3 Qc7 39.Qe4 Re8 40.Ba2+ Kh8 41.Qg6 c5 42.Bd5 Qe5 43.Bf3 Qe6 44.Qh5 Qe7 45.Re3 Qf8 46.Be4 Re6 47.Rf3 Qd6 48.Qd5 g6 49.Qb7 Be8 50.Re3 Re7 51.Qa8 Kg7 52.Rd3 Qf6 53.Rd8 Bf7 54.Rh8 Bc4 55.Rc8 Qa1+ 56.Kg2 Qf1+ 57.Kg3 Qg1+ 58.Bg2 Qc1 59.Rh8 Qc3+ 60.Bf3 Qf6 61.Kg2 Re1 62.Qb8 Re7 63.h4 Be6 64.Rxh6 Bg8 65.g5 Qe5 66.Qxb5 Bd5 67.Qd3 Bxf3+ 68.Kxf3 Qe6 69.Qc3+ Qe5 70.Qd3 Qe6 71.Qc3+ Qe5 72.Qxe5+ Rxe5 73.h5 gxh5 74.Rxh5 c4 75.Rh1 Rxg5 76.Ke4 Rb5 77.Rh3 Rb2 78.Kd4 Rxf2
